title: 'Legbreaker' raises funds for young swimmers
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Royal Swimming Academy,...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Royal Swimming Academy, Outeniqua Harriers athletics club, and George Municipality hosted the highly anticipated Royal Swimming Academy Legbreaker Trail Run at the airfield in Denneoord on Saturday 8 June.

The fundraising event consisted of 10km and 5km distances and aimed to raise funds for the academy's winter initiative, which is dedicated to keeping young swimmers active during the colder months.

This initiative is especially important to those who value the benefits of year-round training and support for our youth.

Selwyn Matthews secured a third place in the 10km.

Reynard Jansen van Rensburg and Christian Hattingh.Marais Kruger enjoyed the mountains on a cold Saturday morning.‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
